videos.title: AirPods Pro 3 starring Vini Jr. with the world’s best in-ear Active Noise Cancellation
videos.description:
The world’s best in-ear Active Noise Cancellation removes up to 2x more noise than AirPods Pro 2 for the most immersive listening experience ever. 

Learn more about AirPods Pro 3 at https://apple.co/4dS8Lsk
 
#AirPods #AirPodsPro3 #ViniJr #Apple 

World’s best Active Noise Cancellation evaluation tested in July 2025 in accordance with IEC 60268-24 as compared with best-selling commercially available wireless in-ear headphones

videos.title: Apple’s next big step for Siri and iPhone
videos.description:
Introducing Siri AI in iOS 27, with more power than ever. Transform your images with next-generation AI. Create photorealistic imagery for wallpapers, Contact Posters, and backgrounds across the system in Image Playground. Use a more conversational Siri AI with natural language abilities to edit and write emails, texts, and documents. Keep your personal information safe with Siri AI and update compromised passwords with just a tap.

#iPhone #SiriAI #Privacy #WWDC26

videos.title: Apple WWDC 2026 June 8: Introducing Siri AI and more
videos.description:
Watch the WWDC26 keynote introducing Siri AI powered by Apple Intelligence — our most personal Siri update ever. You’ll also learn about expanded trust and safety features, and improvements to iOS 27, iPadOS 27, macOS 27, watchOS 27, visionOS 27, and tvOS 27.

To watch the event interpreted in American Sign Language (ASL) or hear it narrated via Audio Descriptions, please click here: https://youtu.be/QTL_we3HspI

Tune in to the Platforms State of the Union livestream here: https://www.youtube.co

videos.title: Privacy on iPhone: Safari helps block data trackers
videos.description:
Safari helps keep data trackers off your back with state-of-the-art features that defend you against cross-site tracking, hide your IP address from known trackers, and more. Safari helps block data trackers from watching you online. It's a browser that’s actually private.

Learn more about Privacy on iPhone at https://apple.co/43ftPCR

“Hårga-Låten” by Zero8: https://apple.co/4ua3S2n

Designing the Hikawa Grip & Stand for iPhone: an accessible accessory

For Audio Descriptions, click the Settings gear icon and choose the descriptive audio track.

videos.title: Accessibility: VoiceOver powered by Apple Intelligence
videos.description:
For those who are blind or have low vision, VoiceOver is a personal, private screen reader that tells you exactly what’s happening on your iPhone. With VoiceOver, you can easily control and navigate your screen through simple gestures and get detailed descriptions of your surroundings using Live Recognition.

In this film, we preview new capabilities coming later this year to VoiceOver powered by Apple Intelligence:

- Summarizing documents like bills
- Providing rich descriptions of images onsc
